message:
feat(stdlib): add http module (client, server, cookies)

- http.client: HTTPConnection, HTTPSConnection, HTTPResponse
- http.server: HTTPServer, ThreadingHTTPServer, BaseHTTPRequestHandler,
  SimpleHTTPRequestHandler, CGIHTTPRequestHandler
- http.cookies: SimpleCookie, BaseCookie with Morsel support
- http.HTTPStatus: all standard HTTP status codes (100-511)
